security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:* http://localhost:*

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first AI memory you can audit.
bundle.longDescription: ThinkingRoot Desktop is a local-first companion for the ThinkingRoot OSS engine. Compile any directory of source code, docs, PDFs, or notes into a typed, source-locked knowledge graph; query it through the in-app brain view; and publish or install verified `.tr` knowledge packs from the cloud registry. Your data stays on your machine.
